name: one-mission
description: One Mission — SaaS de développement personnel et d'organisation gamifié

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.db:deploy: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
